steps.name: groupByArea accepts dynamic area list
steps.criteria: groupByArea(items, areas) returns groups for custom areas including user-added ones. HouseArea type changes from union to string. Existing behavior preserved with default 5 areas. Empty groups for areas with no items.
steps.scenario_name: returns groups for custom areas including a user-added area

steps.name: getSweepProgress with dynamic area count
steps.criteria: createTrip accepts areas parameter. getSweepProgress.totalAreas uses dynamic count. allAreasComplete triggers only after all custom areas done.
steps.scenario_name: shows progress out of 6 when Carlos has 6 areas

steps.name: AreaStorage port + null adapter + area management
steps.criteria: New AreaStorage port with loadAll/saveAll. createNullAreaStorage with default seeding. createAreaManagement with add/getAreas. Duplicate add blocked.
steps.scenario_name: adds a new area that persists in the area list

steps.name: New area in groupByArea + default seeding
steps.criteria: Area added via area management appears in groupByArea output. Fresh install seeds 5 default areas.
steps.scenario_name: newly added area shows items in groupByArea

steps.name: Rename area propagates to staples and trip items
steps.criteria: Rename updates area list, all staples, and active trip items. Blocked when target name exists.
steps.scenario_name: rename propagates to all staples in that area

steps.name: Delete empty area
steps.criteria: Empty area removed from list. Cannot delete last area.

steps.name: Delete area with staple reassignment
steps.criteria: Staples and trip items moved to target area. Duplicate conflict detected.
steps.scenario_name: deletes area with staples and reassigns to target

steps.name: Reorder areas
steps.criteria: Reorder changes list order. groupByArea reflects new order. Persists after restart.

steps.name: Area name validation
steps.criteria: validateAreaName rejects duplicates (case-insensitive), empty/whitespace names, names over 40 chars. Accepts valid names. Trims whitespace.

steps.name: Update existing callers and tests
steps.criteria: All existing tests updated to pass with new groupByArea(items, areas) signature. HomeView, useTrip, MetadataBottomSheet use dynamic areas. All 230+ tests pass.
